arts.ttl: PSG dressing room say same thing after being stunned by Liverpool - they could live to regret it
arts.sum: A number of Paris Saint-Germain players are adamant they will beat Liverpool at Anfield despite their 1-0 loss to the Reds in Paris

arts.ttl: 3 changes Liverpool must make for PSG second leg
arts.sum: Three changes Liverpool must make for their Champions League last 16 second leg with PSG next Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane could deny Mo Salah ultimate dream eight years after Messi-Ronaldo theory
arts.sum: The Bayern Munich striker has not been spoken about in terms of the game's biggest individual award but he could yet be a contender if his club goes all the way in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Liverpool absence confirmed for Southampton after ban as Arne Slot considers changes
arts.sum: Arne Slot has a number of difficult decisions to make ahead of Liverpool's clash with Southampton after being given food for thought by his substitutes in Wednesday's win over PSG

arts.ttl: 'Performance of my life' - Liverpool saved by 'best in world' Alisson
arts.sum: Alisson is described as "the best goalkeeper in the world" after his heroics help Liverpool produce a smash-and-grab performance to beat Paris St-Germain.

arts.ttl: Five reasons why Liverpool No 1 Alisson is the greatest in the world - by the coach who knows him best
arts.sum: Former Liverpool goalkeeper coach John Achterberg worked with Alisson from the moment he signed in a £66.8m deal from Roma in 2018 - then a world record fee for a goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Report: De Jong makes bold step towards deal amid Liverpool interest
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly moving quickly to secure Frenkie de Jong’s future, offering him a contract renewal in an effort to fend off growing Premier League interest. The Dutch midfielder, whose current deal runs until 2026, has been a long-term target for Liverpool and other top European clubs. arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool face prospect of first-teamer making summer transfer, Inter Milan target 34-game midfielder
arts.sum: Curtis Jones is liked by Inter Milan ahead of the summer transfer window, according to reports. The midfielder has been a consistent presence in Liverpool’s midfield this season, making 23 Premier League appearances and contributing three goals and as many assists. arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso sends message Liverpool will love after Champions League thrashing - 'You never know'
arts.sum: Former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso has called on his Bayer Leverkusen team to summon upon the "Miracle of Istanbul" as they look to recover a 3-0 deficit against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold fires PSG five-word warning as Darwin Nunez sends Liverpool message
arts.sum: Liverpool will be ready for a battle of the ages when they host Paris Saint-Germain at Anfield next week
